injuries.comment: The Hurricanes said that Carrier is a game-time decision for Tuesday's (Dec. 23) game versus the Panthers due to an illness.
The Hurricanes said on Monday (Dec. 22) that Martinook hasn't received a timeline yet for his return to the lineup, according to Ryan Henkel of The Hockey News.
Samoskevich did not play on Saturday's (Dec. 20) game versus the Blues.
